userUtterance.text: Does Jamie have any projects with measurable business results?

agentUtterance.text:
Absolutely - Jamie's work consistently delivers quantifiable business impact. Here are the highlights:

**Financial Impact:**
- $8M+ cash funded through the Restaurant Portal Redesign
- $2M saved in contract attorney fees via the Conversational Document Review system

**Conversion & Engagement:**
- 53% increase in user interaction (Restaurant Portal)
- 49% increase in cash advance signups (Restaurant Portal)
- 30% increase in new member signups (Rewards Network)
- 10% reduction in bounce rates (Rewards Network)

**Efficiency & Speed:**
- 40% reduction in development cycles (AI Powered Workflow)
- 90% reduction in document review volume (eDiscovery)
- Production time cut from 4 weeks to 72 hours (eDiscovery)
- 60% faster design review cycles (DesignOps Transformation)

**Team & Process:**
- 3 teams aligned: agency, engineering, product (DesignOps)
- Org-wide AI SDLC framework adopted (DesignOps)
- 3x more visibility for managers (BookedOut)

Jamie approaches every project with measurable outcomes in mind. Would you like details on any specific project?

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: User wants to see projects with measurable results and business impact.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: Aggregated key metrics across all projects showing financial, engagement, efficiency, and team impact.
